title: Rachel Anderson
text: Winston-Salem, NC | rachel00anderson@gmail.com | LinkedIn

title: Rachel Anderson
text: FAA-licensed private pilot and Financial Economics student (3.9 GPA) with hands-on experience in variance and cost analysis, forecasting, account reconciliation, and financial reporting. Advanced Excel and VBA, with a record of building financial models and automated reports.

title: Rachel Anderson
text: Financial Analysis: variance and cost analysis, forecasting and modeling (revenue, expense, cash flow), budgeting, financial reporting and KPIs, income statement and balance sheet analysis, investment and risk analysis Software and Tools: Excel (advanced VBA, Power Query), Microsoft Office Suite, QuickBooks, Bloomberg Terminal, Python, SQL, Power BI, Tableau Accounting Operations: account reconciliation, payment processing, monthly billing and payroll support, data validation, process improvement

title: Rachel Anderson
text: Teaching Assistant, Financial Modeling | Brigham Young University–Idaho Rexburg, ID | May 2026 – Present Selected by the professor to help build a new Financial Modeling course; grade and validate 30+ students’ Excel/VBA financial models, ensuring accurate and consistent evaluation. Work with the professor to integrate AI into model building and to design assignments that test understanding while reducing his workload. Sales Advisor | Tesla, Inc. Idaho Falls, ID | August 2025 – February 2026 Advised 1,000+ clients on pricing and financing options across test drives, contributing to an estimated $1.5M+ in influenced sales. Designed an Excel/VBA CRM to track conversions and follow-ups, ensuring no client opportunity went unaddressed. Administrative Assistant | Teton Valley Lodge Driggs, ID | May 2024 – August 2025 Processed high-value customer payments for a multi-million-dollar lodge operation using QuickBooks and Excel, keeping financial records accurate across all transactions. Built Excel systems to manage payroll and tip allocation of $10,000+ per pay period across 75+ employees, and organized monthly billing and receipts. Receptionist | Foothills Rehabilitation Idaho Falls, ID | May 2024 – January 2025 Processed insurance claims and patient payments with full accuracy, verifying coverage, reconciling balances, and resolving discrepancies in compliance with office procedures. Sales and Product Flow Assistant | Best Buy Co., Inc. Logan, UT | September 2022 – January 2024 Tracked sales and inventory data across 8+ departments to benchmark store performance against other locations nationwide and guide restocking decisions.

title: Rachel Anderson
text: ExxonMobil Equity Research (Bloomberg Terminal, Excel): analyzed revenue and cost trends across the income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow; built a CFA-style valuation from comparables, beta, and analyst consensus. U.S. Treasury Bond Pricing Model (Excel, VBA): fixed-income pricing tool with a custom yield-curve interpolation function that generates a recurring automated daily PDF report. Real Estate and Mortgage Model (Excel): 360-month cash-flow forecast with dynamic PMI lookup and refinance break-even and rate-buydown scenario analysis. Automated Stock Alert Monitor (Excel, VBA, Gmail): tracks live prices against preset targets and sends automated email alerts when actuals cross thresholds; built to keep working through any sheet edits.

title: Rachel Anderson
text: Brigham Young University–Idaho Rexburg, ID | Expected April 2027 B.S., Financial Economics; Minor: Business Analytics; GPA 3.9. Coursework: Advanced Financial Management, Managerial Economics, Econometrics, Data Science Programming (Python). Utah State University Logan, UT | August 2023 A.S., Aviation Technology; FAA Private Pilot; 100+ flight hours.

title: Rachel Anderson
text: FAA Private Pilot (2022) Bloomberg Market Concepts (2026) Data Science Certificate, BYU–Idaho (2026) Business Fundamentals, BYU–Idaho (2025) In progress: SAP S/4HANA finance fundamentals coursework (SAP Learning)

title: Rachel Anderson
text: Volunteer English Teacher | International Language Programs, Vanuatu — taught 50+ students abroad (February – May 2024)

title: about me
text: Hi, I’m Rachel I’m a Financial Economics student at BYU–Idaho (minor in Business Analytics) with a passion for building tools that turn data into decisions — from Excel/VBA financial models and automated reporting pipelines to analysis in Python and SQL. I’m also an FAA-licensed private pilot. This site is my data science portfolio. You can find my resume here, and as I complete new projects in data cleansing, exploration, storytelling, and machine learning, they’ll be posted in the sections above.

title: about me
text: Email: rachel00anderson@gmail.com LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/rachel-anderson–
